subcodes.first_line: This is the Tree of the Cause that hath put forth leaves through the praise of God and His manifestations, then hath yielded sacred, ripe fruits. By God! Whoso hath tasted thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه شجره الامر قد تورقت بثناء الله و ظهوراته ثم اثمرت بفواکه قدس جنیا تالله من ذاقها
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
